description_long: This bungalow features a retro diner-style interior with pastel green and white checkered flooring, red doors, and a combination of booth and bar seating. The walls are clad in white paneling, and the space is divided into a main dining area, a counter with stools, and a back section separated by partitions. The exterior is simple, with flat walls and minimal ornamentation, punctuated by bold red doors and a large window. The roof is flat, and the building appears to be single-story with no visible attic or upper floor. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for a small urban lot.
description: A single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white paneled walls, red doors, and a retro diner-style interior featuring checkered floors and booth seating.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main dining area with tables, chairs, and a bar counter with stools, as well as the partitioned back section and two red doors.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the bar counter, stools, and the arrangement of tables and chairs, with a clear view of the checkered flooring and back partition.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the exterior with two prominent red doors and a large window, emphasizing the flat facade and minimalistic design.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a look at the side and back of the bungalow, showing the flat roof, additional red door, and the rear partitioned area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with a single large front window
